steps.title: Separate two sentences
steps.content: The first independent clause ends after Tan noticed markings on the temple walls. The next words begin a new sentence explaining how, with digital imaging techniques, he discovered what the markings were.

steps.title: Reject run-ons
steps.content: Choice A creates a comma splice between independent clauses. Choice B gives no punctuation between the clauses. Choice C adds so in a place where it does not create a grammatical sentence. The answer is D.
